name: AWS STS Outgoing Cross-Account Role Assumption Without MFA And ExternalID
description: This model detected a successful outgoing cross-account role assumption without MFA and ExternalId to an external AWS account, which might indicate an attacker trying to laterally move onto another AWS account to further compromise the target account.

rules.name: AWS STS Outgoing Cross-Account Role Assumption Without MFA And ExternalID

author: Yash Verma
